CHARGING SYSTEM DEFECT: The manufacturer-supplied portable charger (rated 9.6kW at 240V/40A) delivers only 7.4kW — a 23% shortfall. The authorized dealer confirmed this measurement in March 2026 but refused to repair, stating "no issues." The charging rate also degrades over time

narrative.headline: What 2024 Audi Q8 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 18 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (44% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
